comment.text: This key displays a label indicating the availability of additional storage space. It appears in the Order Summary panel within the Portal Settings, specifically when the user has not exceeded their storage limit and is not on a downgraded storage plan. Translators should ensure the meaning conveys supplementary storage options.

usage.context:
{!isExceedingStorageLimit ? (
 <div className={styles.summaryRow}>
 <Text fontSize="14px" className={styles.rowLabel}>
 {isDowngradeStoragePlan
 ? t("ReducedStorage")
 : t("AdditionalStorageInfo")}
 </Text>
 <Text
 fontWeight="600"
 fontSize="14px"
 className={styles.rowValue}
